top_signals.title: Russia pounds Kyiv with ballistic missiles in escalating air war
top_signals.summary: Ukraine is facing intensifying Russian missile attacks alongside rare domestic political instability triggered by a sudden wartime shakeup of its defense leadership.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A friendly ‘peaches-and-cream’ fellow
top_signals.summary: Kosame, whose name means "light rain," will make a fabulous companion for any owner.
